insight: ModelEngine custom attack animations exist since Boss 5.6.6 (#1440), so users who tested earlier wrongly assume they are unsupported. Configure via /boss menu > Settings > ModelEngine > Custom Attack Animations with names matching the blueprint; a random one plays per melee hit, and it only works when Custom Models is also enabled for that Boss.

BetterModel is not a drop-in replacement for the ModelEngine hook since it uses its own API, so BetterModel requests are a separate integration feature request (#1546), not a config issue. Also note ModelEngine's Custom_Models is a list where one model is picked randomly on each Boss spawn.
